grant_title: The Zoos, Botanical Gardens and Aquariums Program (ZBGA)
project_area: Development and preservation of natural heritage collections and programs
demographic_requirements: Applicants must own, house, and care for living or systematically organized collections of biological specimens and primarily provide services to the general public on a regular basis.
eligibility_summary: Public or not-for-profit organizations including Zoos, Botanical Gardens, Herbariums, Arboretums, Aquariums, Bird Sanctuaries, Natural Habitat Preserves, Natural Science Museums, and Nature and Environmental Centers that meet the specified criteria.
